zhTitle: AI 入口正在从 App 重新分配到设备与系统层
enTitle: AI entry points are moving from apps into systems and devices
zhSummary: Apple、Google、Microsoft 把 agent 推进 OS、AI PC、智能眼镜与 agent-first device。野生信号与研究信号显示，用户真正关心的是电池、隐私、反馈和控制权。
enSummary: Apple, Google, and Microsoft are pushing agents into operating systems, AI PCs, smart glasses, and agent-first devices. Wild and research signals show that battery, privacy, feedback, and control are becoming the real UX battleground.

coverStory.zhTitle: Googlebook 把 AI PC 从功能清单推成一个新入口类别
coverStory.enTitle: Googlebook pushes the AI PC from feature bundle into new entry-point category
zhSummary: 最强信号不是又多了一个模型能力，而是电脑形态被重新定义为 Gemini Intelligence 的容器。
这类入口会把用户的输入、上下文和反馈从 App 内部迁移到系统层。
如果成立，AI PC 的竞争重点会从芯片跑分转向日常任务闭环、权限透明和可恢复控制。
enSummary: The strongest signal is not another model feature, but a laptop category reframed as a Gemini Intelligence container.
That moves input, context, and feedback from individual apps into the system layer.
If it holds, AI PC competition shifts from chip benchmarks toward everyday task closure, permission clarity, and recoverable control.
coverStory.whyCover: It changes the product interface boundary: the laptop becomes an AI system surface, not just a host for AI apps.

topics.zhHeadline: Apple：Siri AI 把屏幕、个人上下文和 App actions 变成系统级入口
topics.enHeadline: Apple: Siri AI turns screen state, personal context, and app actions into an OS-level entry point
topics.zhFact: Apple Newsroom 描述了更强的 Siri AI、屏幕内容理解、个人上下文搜索和跨 App actions。
topics.enFact: Apple Newsroom describes stronger Siri AI, onscreen awareness, personal-context search, and broader app actions.
topics.zhValue: 价值不在“聊天更聪明”，而在用户不用先决定打开哪个 App；系统可以从当前屏幕和历史上下文接手。
topics.enValue: The value is not smarter chat; it is removing the need to choose an app before the system can act on screen and personal context.
topics.zhImplication: OS 级 AI 必须设计可见权限、可撤销动作、失败恢复和“我为什么这样做”的解释层。
topics.enImplication: OS-level AI needs visible permission, undo, failure recovery, and a clear explanation layer for why it acted.

visual.altZh: Apple Siri AI onscreen awareness official image
visual.altEn: Apple Siri AI onscreen awareness official image
visual.captionZh: 官方视觉：Siri AI 与屏幕上下文
visual.captionEn: Official visual: Siri AI and screen context

topics.zhHeadline: Googlebook：Gemini Intelligence 试图重写 AI PC 的默认交互
topics.enHeadline: Googlebook: Gemini Intelligence tries to rewrite default AI PC interaction
topics.zhFact: Google Blog 把 Googlebook 定义为为 Gemini Intelligence 设计的新 laptop 类别，并强调 Magic Pointer、Create your Widget 等系统层能力。
topics.enFact: Google Blog frames Googlebook as a new laptop category designed for Gemini Intelligence, with system capabilities such as Magic Pointer and Create your Widget.
topics.zhValue: 这不是把聊天框塞进电脑，而是把光标、桌面和 widget 变成 agent 的输入/反馈界面。
topics.enValue: This is not just a chat box on a laptop; it turns pointer, desktop, and widgets into agent input and feedback surfaces.
topics.zhImplication: AI PC 的 UI 重点会从“模型在哪里”转向“系统如何把上下文交给模型，并把结果放回用户工作流”。
topics.enImplication: AI PC UI shifts from where the model lives to how the system hands context to it and returns results into the workflow.

visual.captionZh: 官方视觉：Googlebook / AI PC 类别
visual.captionEn: Official visual: Googlebook / AI PC category

topics.zhHeadline: Android XR：智能眼镜开始从回答问题转向执行真实任务
topics.enHeadline: Android XR: smart glasses move from answering questions toward executing tasks
topics.zhFact: Google Blog 描述了搭载 Gemini 的音频/显示眼镜，覆盖导航、消息、通话、翻译和 partner app action。
topics.enFact: Google Blog describes Gemini-powered audio and display glasses covering navigation, messages, calls, translation, and partner app actions.
topics.zhValue: 眼镜的关键不是“戴着问 AI”，而是输入更低摩擦、上下文更连续、反馈更贴近当下环境。
topics.enValue: The key is not asking AI while wearing glasses; it is lower-friction input, more continuous context, and feedback closer to the user's environment.
topics.zhImplication: 智能眼镜产品要优先解决录制提示、旁人可见性、低打扰反馈和失败时的手动接管。
topics.enImplication: Smart-glasses products must solve recording indicators, bystander visibility, low-interruption feedback, and manual takeover when actions fail.

visual.altZh: Google Android XR eyewear official visual
visual.altEn: Google Android XR eyewear official visual

topics.zhHeadline: Microsoft Solara：agent-first device 需要新的 shell、身份和管理栈
topics.enHeadline: Microsoft Solara: agent-first devices need a new shell, identity, and management stack
topics.zhFact: Microsoft Command Line 将 Project Solara 描述为面向 agent-first devices 的平台组合，包含 MDEP、Agent Shell、Intune、Entra ID 和 just-in-time UI。
topics.enFact: Microsoft Command Line describes Project Solara as a platform composition for agent-first devices, including MDEP, Agent Shell, Intune, Entra ID, and just-in-time UI.
topics.zhValue: 它提示企业级 AI 设备不会只是一个 app；它需要设备管理、身份、隐私指示和临时 UI 共同工作。
topics.enValue: It signals that enterprise AI devices are not just apps; they need device management, identity, privacy indicators, and temporary UI working together.
topics.zhImplication: agentic device 的 UX 底座是 trust infrastructure：物理麦克风状态、权限边界、审计轨迹和 IT 可控性。
topics.enImplication: The UX base for agentic devices is trust infrastructure: mic state, permission boundaries, audit trail, and IT control.

visual.captionZh: 自绘机制图：基于 Microsoft 官方文章，非产品渲染
visual.captionEn: Self-drawn mechanism diagram based on Microsoft article; not a product render

topics.zhHeadline: 野生信号：AI 眼镜和 coding HUD 正在用众筹/社区方式试错
topics.enHeadline: Wild signal: AI glasses and coding HUDs are being tested through crowdfunding and communities
topics.zhFact: Product Hunt、Kickstarter 和 Reddit 信号显示，创业产品在 HUD、录制总结、翻译、tap-to-AI 和全天佩戴之间快速试错。
topics.enFact: Product Hunt, Kickstarter, and Reddit signals show startups testing HUDs, recording summaries, translation, tap-to-AI, and all-day wearability.
topics.zhValue: 这些不是强商业事实，但很适合观察用户愿不愿意把 AI 入口戴在脸上，以及他们最先抱怨什么。
topics.enValue: These are not strong market facts, but they are useful for watching whether users accept AI entry points on the face and what they complain about first.
topics.zhImplication: 野生产品最先暴露真实阻力：电池、隐私、佩戴羞耻、录制边界和“AI slop”感。
topics.enImplication: Wild products expose the real friction first: battery, privacy, wearability embarrassment, recording boundaries, and AI-slop perception.

visual.captionZh: 自绘信号图：基于 Product Hunt / Kickstarter / Reddit，非产品渲染
visual.captionEn: Self-drawn signal map based on Product Hunt / Kickstarter / Reddit; not a product render

topics.zhHeadline: 研究信号：agentic AI 的核心问题正在从界面效率转向人的控制权
topics.enHeadline: Research signal: agentic AI is shifting the problem from interface efficiency to human control
topics.zhFact: CUI/arXiv 论文讨论 conversational AI 时代 agency 的迁移；Microsoft Research CHI EA 原型把 wearable ring 作为低摩擦 agent 输入。
topics.enFact: A CUI/arXiv paper discusses agency relocation in conversational AI, while a Microsoft Research CHI EA prototype uses a wearable ring as low-friction agent input.
topics.zhValue: 论文提醒产品团队：越少显性界面，越要认真设计过程控制、反馈和退出路径。
topics.enValue: The papers remind product teams that the less explicit the interface, the more important process control, feedback, and exit paths become.
zhHciLens: Feedback: confidence gap without clear cues
Agentic: process control vs outcome control
enHciLens: Feedback: confidence gap without clear cues
Agentic: process control vs outcome control
topics.zhImplication: 未来 AI OS / 眼镜 / ring 不应只追求“无界面”，而要把确认、纠错、暂停和解释做成轻量但可见的控制层。
topics.enImplication: Future AI OS, glasses, and rings should not just chase no-interface; they need lightweight but visible confirmation, correction, pause, and explanation controls.
topics.evidenceStrength: medium / peer-reviewed or research prototype signal

visual.altZh: Agency and wearable ring research mechanism diagram
visual.altEn: Agency and wearable ring research mechanism diagram
visual.captionZh: 自绘研究机制图：基于 CUI / CHI EA 论文，非产品渲染
visual.captionEn: Self-drawn research diagram based on CUI / CHI EA papers; not a product render

topics.zhHeadline: 专利雷达：今天不把搜索结果写成已确认产品事实
topics.enHeadline: Patent radar: today's search path is not presented as confirmed product fact
topics.zhFact: 本期保留 patent watch 入口，但没有把单个专利包装成已发布产品。后续自动化应同时扫 Google Patents 与 CNIPA，并标注 patent signal。
topics.enFact: This issue keeps a patent-watch lane but does not repackage any single patent as a shipped product. Future automation should scan Google Patents and CNIPA and label patent signals.
topics.zhValue: 专利对软硬件产品很有用，但它是方向信号，不等于上市计划、可用功能或发布日期。
topics.enValue: Patents are useful for soft/hardware direction, but they are signals, not launch plans, available features, or release dates.
topics.zhImplication: 日报正文必须把 patent signal 和 product fact 分开，避免把“申请过”误读为“要发布”。
topics.enImplication: The brief must separate patent signals from product facts to avoid reading 'filed' as 'shipping'.

visual.captionZh: 自绘流程图：专利信号如何进入日报，不代表产品渲染
visual.captionEn: Self-drawn flow diagram for patent-signal handling; not a product render

topics.zhHeadline: 中国/海外对比：眼镜和 AI PC 都在抢“默认入口”，但证据强度不同
topics.enHeadline: China / global compare: glasses and AI PCs compete for default entry, but evidence strength differs
topics.zhFact: 海外大厂信号来自官方 OS、AI PC、XR 和 agent shell；中国相关信号在本期主要出现在 Kickstarter/Rokid 等创业与众筹链路中。
topics.enFact: Global big-tech signals come from official OS, AI PC, XR, and agent-shell announcements; China-related signals in this issue mainly appear through startup and crowdfunding routes such as Rokid.
topics.zhValue: 这说明同一产品方向上，官方平台事实和野生市场试错必须分开读。
topics.enValue: The same product direction needs two reading modes: confirmed platform facts and wild-market experimentation.
topics.zhImplication: 主页和正文需要用 evidence strength 标签把官方事实、社区信号、众筹信号、专利信号分层显示。
topics.enImplication: Homepage and issue pages should visibly separate official facts, community signals, crowdfunding signals, and patent signals through evidence-strength labels.
topics.evidenceStrength: medium for comparison / weak for China-specific market proof

visual.altZh: China and global signal comparison diagram
visual.altEn: China and global signal comparison diagram
visual.captionZh: 自绘对比图：官方平台信号 vs 野生市场信号
visual.captionEn: Self-drawn comparison diagram: official platform signals vs wild market signals

watchlistZh: AI OS / shell 的权限与撤销设计是否会成为平台差异点。
智能眼镜能否从 demo 走向可长期佩戴的输入/反馈系统。
野生产品信号需要继续扫 Reddit、Product Hunt、Kickstarter、独立评测和中国创业产品。
专利信号只作为方向雷达，不能当成发布事实。
watchlistEn: Whether permission and undo design becomes the differentiator for AI OS and shells.
Whether smart glasses can move from demos into long-wear input and feedback systems.
Wild signals should keep scanning Reddit, Product Hunt, Kickstarter, independent reviews, and Chinese startup products.
Patent signals stay directional and must not be treated as launch facts.
